principal_verdict: INDETERMINATE — second-dimension turnover survival not certified on held-out data; SMC-01 collapse corrected as non-robust
one_line: SMC-01's h2 turnover-collapse was underpowered (n=14, single family) and does NOT robustly replicate; a 4-seed pool retains h2 to M=0.58 (CI[0.57,0.97]) and new material inherits h2 as well as old (0.77/0.77). The loss is NOT smoothing (ablations identical; dispersion GROWS) and NOT dilution -> no correctable maintenance mechanism (Phase B not authorized). But the sealed prospective family (n=12) is underpowered: h2 0.43-0.48 through turnover, below the 0.50 gate; deep turnover M<=0.25 not robustly reached -> INDETERMINATE.
phase_A_mechanism: NOT passive temporal relaxation, NOT dilution, NOT diffusion/templating homogenization. Where h2 degrades at deep turnover it is SNR loss (growing history-independent dispersion) + small-n decoder instability. Closest label: REPRESENTATIONAL DRIFT / MULTIPLE COUPLED CAUSES; SMC-01 loss largely an underpowered-estimation artefact.

gates.G5_time_turnover_decorrelated: PASS (ablation branches keep h2 while M falls; smoothing decoupled from turnover)
gates.G6_no_turnover_control_valid: PARTIAL (ablation branches serve as maintenance controls; a full frozen-body static branch not separately needed once smoothing shown null)
gates.G8_decoder_drift_excluded: PARTIAL (checkpoint-specific decoders used; deep-turnover estimate unstable across families -> instability, not clean info loss)
gates.G9_old_new_material_separated: PASS (old 0.77 vs new 0.77 at M~0.44 -> new material inherits h2)
gates.G16_prospective_executed_once: PASS (used to validate passive-retention claim, once)
gates.G20_h2_survives: INDETERMINATE (dev clears to M0.58; prospective below 0.50; deep turnover CI spans zero)
gates.G21_new_material_acquires_h2: PASS-PASSIVE (new material inherits local memory distribution via Mf+=g*m; not active reconstruction)
gates.G22_active_reconstruction_exceeds_passiv: NOT RUN (no maintenance candidate; dilution-recovery not executed)
gates.G27_no_tag_cohort_tracker_leakage: PASS (tracer passive; no labels in dynamics)

key_numbers.smoothing_ablation: A0=A4=A3=A34 h2 trajectories identical (0.97->0.78 over 300 steps)

next_experiment: Power, not mechanism. The decisive uncertainty is statistical: certify (or refute) h2 turnover-retention with many more donors/seeds (>=8) and deeper turnover (M<=0.25) with proper grouped CIs, on a pre-sealed family, BEFORE any maintenance modification. If h2 then robustly clears 0.50 through deep turnover, an ACTIVE-reconstruction (dilution-recovery) test is the next gate; if not, the 1-D organizational-memory conclusion stands and escalation should stop.
